agrapha.2:3: "…but remembering what the Lord said as he taught: 'Do not judge, that you may not be judged; forgive, and it will be forgiven to you; show mercy, that you may be shown mercy; with what measure you measure, it will be measured back to you.'" (Polycarp, Epistle to the Philippians 2:3, c. 110 CE)
